audit_items.proof_trace: In the non-master branch, no pointer is dereferenced after processInputBuffer returns. In the master branch, if freeClient(c) is called during processInputBuffer, the freeClient guard at L954-963 redirects to replicationCacheMaster(c) which calls unlinkClient (setting the sentinel to NULL) but preserves c as server.cached_master via zfree-free caching, so c is never actually freed. The CLIENT_BLOCKED exception to caching cannot be triggered mid-loop because processInputBuffer breaks at L1525 before any command executes when CLIENT_BLOCKED is already set.
